summary: Tested all 10 DoggyBakeryCakeModal personalisation features. 10/10 PASS. Modal opens correctly from both breed-cake-banner and Breed Cakes category strip. No TDZ errors. Pet-first breed pill, fave badges, sorted flavours, wider modal (760px), 4-column grid all working as specified.

issues: Mojo has petAllergy1=Chicken in soul data, but getAllergies() in DoggyBakeryCakeModal only reads food_allergies field (not petAllergy1). Chicken cake flavour is NOT hidden for Mojo. Minor gap — only relevant if petAllergy1 should be treated as an allergy source for the modal filter.

Banana shows as 'Mojo's fave' (taste_banana=True in soul data) and appears 2nd in sorted list, pushing Fish (Salmon) to 3rd position. Requirement says 'Salmon and Peanut Butter appear first' — both do appear before non-faves, but Banana (also a fave) is between them. Behaviour is technically correct per code logic.

T1_breed_cake_banner.text_found: A cake that looks like Mojo 🎂

T3_no_tdz_errors.safeFlavours_before_useState: Line 156 — declared BEFORE useState. No TDZ.

T7_faves_sorted_first.note: 3 faves (peanut_butter, banana, fish_salmon) all appear before non-faves. Banana also fave due to taste_banana=True in Mojo's soul. Both Peanut Butter and Fish Salmon appear before non-faves.

action_items: INFO: petAllergy1=Chicken in Mojo's soul data is NOT read by getAllergies() in DoggyBakeryCakeModal — only food_allergies field is checked. If petAllergy1 should be treated as an allergy source, the getAllergies() function needs to also check soul.petAllergy1.

INFO: Banana gets 'Mojo's fave' badge and appears 2nd in sorted list (taste_banana=True in Mojo's soul). This pushes Fish Salmon to 3rd position — all 3 favourites correctly appear before non-faves. Expected behaviour per code logic.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: getAllergies() checks soul.food_allergies and pet.allergies but ignores soul.petAllergy1 — Mojo has petAllergy1=Chicken but Chicken flavour is not filtered out for Mojo in the cake modal.
CODE OK: safeFlavours declared before useState at line 156 — TDZ fix is correct and working.
CODE OK: sortedFlavours at line 159 correctly sorts faves first using petFavIds.
CODE OK: orderedBreeds at line 164 puts defaultBreed first, shown as 'Mojo (Indie)' via isPetBreed check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DoggyBakeryCakeModal personalisation fully working: breed-cake-banner at /celebrate, Breed Cakes strip pill, 'Mojo (Indie)' first breed pill, fave badges on Fish Salmon + Peanut Butter (+ Banana due to taste_banana=True), 4-col illustration grid (verified with beagle breed), modal width=760px, TDZ fix confirmed. Indie breed illustrations not yet generated (161 variants in background). cake-order-btn: disabled when no illustration, enabled when auto-selected. Auth: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123 (JWT token via /api/auth/login, stored as tdb_auth_token in localStorage).
rca_of_issues: No bugs found. All personalisation features work as designed.
